text: Except with regard to Workers' Compensation and Professional liability insurance (where applicable), all insurance required by this Exhibit shall name the following parties as additional insureds: GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC, GS Development Central, LLC, GS Construction Mountain, LLC, GS Construction Holdings, LLC, Greystar Real Estate Partners, LLC, any person or entity requested by Owner and (i) all of their directly or indirectly related or affiliated owners, parent companies, subsidiary companies, partnerships, joint ventures, trusts, REITS, lenders, other entities of any tier in which any of these entities is an owner, partner, member or manager, and any entity in which they or any of these entities have an ownership interest or management control, directly or indirectly, all as now exist or may hereafter be constituted or acquired (collectively, 'Affiliates'), (ii) any party in interest which they or any Affiliates are responsible to insure, and (iii) all directors, officers, trustees, managers, and borrowed, leased, or actual employees of any of them, Affiliates, or Greystar Management Services, LLC or other related employment entity.
